title: I’ve been in love with the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 for a year — and I’ll give it all up for another hour with the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra
summary: Unlike the Z Fold 8, the Z Fold 8 Ultra offers the exact same screen dimensions as the Z Fold 7, with an 8-inch inner display and 6.5-inch cover display.
